---
title: "Timeline"
---

## Event Timeline

::: {.timeline-item}
### August 28, Friday
**Registration opens**
Students may register individually or as a team.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### October 16, Friday
**Registration Closes**
All participants must complete registration by this date.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### November 2, Monday, 6 PM
**Kickoff + Dataset Introduction**  
Teams receive the challenge overview and dataset information.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### November 3-6, Tuesday–Friday
**Team Analysis + Office Hours**  
Teams work on their analyses and receive feedback from faculty, industry professionals, and advanced students.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### November 6, Friday, 11 PM
**Write-Up Due**  
Teams submit a short write-up, maximum 2 pages.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### November 7, Saturday, 10 AM
**Presentations + Judging**  
Teams present their findings and answer questions from judges.
:::
